COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMOS FINANCIAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEAN RODATOS AKA CONSTANTINE DEXTER RODATOS JR AKA CONSTANTINE RODATOS AKA DEAN RADATOS DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-18-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-03-2012
